articles.title: Aftershock reveals 2026 lineup
articles.summary: Headliners include My Chemical Romance, Limp Bizkit, Pierce the Veil, and Tool.

articles.title: Aftershock 2026 Lineup - Over 140 Bands Announced
articles.summary: Allen J. Schaben / Los Angeles Times, Getty Images / Katja Ogrin/Redferns, Getty Images / Matt Winkelmeyer, Getty Images / Kevin RC Wilson, Loudwire / Aftershock

articles.title: MY CHEMICAL ROMANCE, TOOL, LIMP BIZKIT And PIERCE THE VEIL To Headline 2026 AFTERSHOCK Festival
articles.summary: Danny Wimmer Presents has announced the full music lineup for the fourteenth year of Aftershock, set to take place October 1-4 at the scenic Discovery Park in Sacramento, California.

articles.title: Aftershock 2026 Lineup Revealed: MY CHEMICAL ROMANCE, TOOL, LIMP BIZKIT & PIERCE THE VEIL To Headline
articles.summary: Aftershock 2026 lineup announcement featuring My Chemical Romance, The Offspring, Sublime, Limp Bizkit, and more, with event dates Oct 1-4 in Sacramento.

articles.title: BILLY MORRISON Enlists MARILYN MANSON, SULLY ERNA, NUNO BETTENCOURT And DEXTER HOLLAND For 'Hollow' Album
articles.summary: Two years ago, Billy Morrison released "The Morrison Project." Now he's back with a new album featuring guest appearances from Marilyn Manson, Sully Erna, and more.

articles.title: Charli XCX, the Strokes, the xx, and More Performing at Outside Lands 2026
articles.summary: The San Francisco festival will also feature Rüfus Du Sol, Baby Keem, Turnstile, Dijon, Death Cab for Cutie, Clipse, and Geese

articles.title: Held. (The Sleeping, Coheed) preview debut LP with “CONSTANT TENSION”
articles.summary: The supergroup will host an album listening party for GREY this week in Brooklyn.
